exports.name: mountLandingView
exports.signature: (container: HTMLElement, onCreate: () -> void, onJoin: (autoCode?: string) -> void) -> { unmount: () -> void }

exports.name: mountCreateGameView
exports.signature: (container: HTMLElement, onCreated: (gameId: string) -> void) -> { unmount: () -> void }

exports.name: mountJoinGameView
exports.signature: (container: HTMLElement, prefilledCode: string | null, onJoined: (gameId: string) -> void) -> { unmount: () -> void }

exports.name: mountWaitingForOpponentView
exports.signature: (container: HTMLElement, gameId: string, shareCode: string, joinUrl: string) -> { unmount: () -> void }

invariants: Section-6's router uses URL query (?join=<code>) and game-document status (read via section-2) to decide which of section-5's views to mount before any active gameId is known.
